Elena Rodriguez

Email: elena.r@email.com | GitHub: github.com/elenarodriguez

Summary:
Data scientist with 4 years of experience in machine learning and analytics. Proficient in Python for data science and ML model development.

Experience:

Data Scientist — AnalyticsPro (2021–Present)
- Built machine learning models using scikit-learn, XGBoost, and PyTorch
- Developed NLP pipelines with spaCy and Hugging Face transformers
- Created data visualizations with matplotlib and Plotly
- Deployed models on AWS SageMaker

ML Engineer — DataLab Corp (2020–2021)
- Built ETL pipelines with Python and Apache Spark
- Developed recommendation systems using collaborative filtering
- Performed A/B testing and statistical analysis

Data Analyst — InsightCo (2019–2020)
- Analyzed datasets using pandas and SQL
- Created dashboards in Tableau and Power BI

Education:
M.S. Data Science, Columbia University (2019)
B.S. Statistics, University of Michigan (2017)

Skills:
Python, pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, XGBoost, spaCy, SQL, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Jupyter, matplotlib, Tableau, Machine Learning, NLP, Statistics
